steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage highlights a juxtaposition of sleek, contemporary metal elements with traditional organic materials, indicating that the blank needs a word meaning their combination.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: D) synthesis fits because it means the blending of two distinct elements into a unified whole, which matches the juxtaposition described. The other three either refer to naming, examining, or spreading, none of which convey the idea of combination. That matches choice D — D is correct.
